title: delivery: detect_quote_links called twice on the same processed_html
description: In process_batch (delivery.rs), crate::content::detect_quote_links(&processed_html) is called at line 218 to build tag_json, and again at line 245 to extract the first quote URL for the quoteUrl field. Both calls scan the same string with the same regex. The second call is redundant: the Vec returned by the first call already contains the data needed. The result of the first call should be reused.
close_reason: Fixed: detect_quote_links called once, result reused.
